title: phaseoloides zollingerianum
intro: Phaseoloides zollingerianum, also known as the Chinese kidney bean or Adzuki bean, is a type of legume plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to lower cholesterol levels and regulate blood sugar levels, making it a valuable resource in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Phaseoloides zollingerianum include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and aid in weight management. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions, teas, and infusions, as well as being consumed as a food source, particularly in the form of its edible beans.
